title: Multi-clause where with pinned values
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.filter/1` that takes a map with `:team_id`, `:min_age`, and `:role`. All three are required (no optional handling). Build a `from(...)` query with all three conditions pinned and `and`-combined. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multi-pin practice — three values in one where. Mechanical.
